ham.subject: Your Flipkart Order #1234567890 has been Shipped!
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart. Your order #1234567890 has been dispatched from the warehouse and is on its way to your delivery address.

• Product: Sony WH-1000XM4 Wireless Headphones
• Quantity: 1
• Total Amount: ₹12,999.00
• Shipping Method: Flipkart Express
• Expected Delivery: 3-5 working days

You can track your package anytime through our tracking portal: <URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email or visit our Help Center.

Thank you for choosing Flipkart!

Best regards,
Flipkart Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Helpdesk Ticket #987654 - Account Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have received a request to reset your account password. Our automated system has created a ticket for this activity:

Ticket ID: 987654
Requester: IT Helpdesk
Date: 15 Apr 2026

To verify your identity and complete the password reset, please click on the link below:

<URL>

Please note that if we do not receive a response within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily locked for security reasons.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best,
IT Helpdesk Team

© 2026 Secure IT Services
